titleStmt.title: SII 10.349: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 349. (A.R. No. 700 of 1926.) ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE SOUTH WALL OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMĒŚVARA, ACHANTA, NARSAPURAM TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1177.

summary.p: States that Rājemarāja Eṟṟa Lakshmīrāju, lord of Vēṅgi, and Pina Lakshmīrāju gave 25 inupa-yeḍlu for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Āsaṇṭa Rāmēśvara-Mahādēva, that Vishṇuvardhana Vijayāditya gave his daughter Mailāradēvi in marriage to Āsaṇṭa Sūraparāja and gave her, as dowry, a garden containing 500 arecanut trees and that their son Pina Lakshmīrāju presented a garden containing 1,000 arecanut trees to Āsaṇṭa Rāmēśvara-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1177 gu nēṁṭṭi Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntinimittamuna [Āsaṁṭṭaśrīrā]
mīśvaraśrīmahādēvaraku rājemarāju Eṟṟalakṣmīrāju vēṁgīśvaruṁḍu pinalakṣmīrāju
runu peṭṭina Akhaṁḍadīpamunaku InupaEḍlu 25 piḍāma kommanabōyanikoḍku bhīmana bōyuṁḍu vī
niṁ jēkoni nityasāni māneṁḍu neyi naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu Itaniki kṣētramu kōḍēṭi paḍumaṭi polamu
Anubhaviṁppaṁgalavāṁḍu . Inaśaśidiggajatāraka vananidhikulaśaila gaṇa vasudhāgni samī
kalayaṁttakālamu vinutaṁbai dīptimigili veluṁgucunuṁḍunu . likhitamu tāripāka
svasti sa¨rvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuva¨rddhanamahārāju laina vijayādityadēvacakrava¨rtti damakūṁttu
ṟu mailāradēvini yasaṁṭṭi sūraparājuna kicci Asaṁṭṭa guṁḍḍāmu Alvunuttarāna pōṁkkatōṁṭṭayē nūṟu
tōḍa naraṇa miccenu tamataṁḍri sūraparājunaku mailāradēviki dha¨rmmuvu gānu śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 11
caitraśuddha 5 bṛhaspativāramunāṇḍu pinalakṣmīrāju dhāravōsi Āsaṁṭṭarāmīśvaraśrī mahādēvaraki
tū¨rppuna peddatōṭa pinalakṣmīrāju peṭṭinccinadi vēyi pōkkamrānkulu 1000 śrīśrīśrī
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vvā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭi ¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
bulū ṁṭṭi vaiśākhaśuddha tritiyyayu śukravāramunāṁḍu Asaṁṭṭa śrīrāmīśvara
yēlu nāyaṁḍu nakāmināya tamatallidaṁḍrulaku dha¨rmmuvugā rāmīśvaraśrīmahādēvaraku
māla sama¨rppiṁcce śrīlikhitamu tāṭipara mōju Idīpānaku koṁḍa ma
Digital edition of SII 10.349 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
